top_errors.message: BeamRemnants::setKinematics: kinematics construction failed after retrying 10 times

top_warnings.message: Pythia::check: not quite matched particle energy/momentum/mass
StringFragmentation::fragmentToJunction: bad convergence junction rest frame

next_steps: Inspect detailed log slices for BeamRemnants failures and consider adjusting MPI/beam-remnant parameters.
Review string fragmentation settings or switch tune to reduce junction-related recoveries.
Check shower weight distributions; if pathological, retune pT ordering or apply weight capping.
Validate key observables with an alternate seed or reduced timesAllowErrors to ensure robustness.
risks: Repeated BeamRemnants::setKinematics failures hint at unstable beam-remnant reconstruction.
String fragmentation stalls and junction convergence issues could bias hadronization observables.
Space-shower weights above unity and energy-momentum mismatches indicate stressed shower tuning.
llm_run_summary.tldr: 20000 SoftQCD events accepted but frequent beam remnant and fragmentation recoveries plus elevated shower warnings; treat results with caution.

suggestions: Inspect top error categories in diagnostics before trusting physics conclusions.
Review warning categories; repeated shower or hadronization warnings can bias tails.
Compare at least two nearby seeds to confirm stability of key yields.
teammate_summary.tldr: Minimum-bias / underlying-event QCD study: attempted 20000 events, accepted 20000, failed 0. Viability assessment: caution.
